title: ShiNeaL's Simplastic Mods
description: Mod support addon for ShiNeaL's Simplastic Pack
body: ShiNeaL's Simplastic Mods: This pack is a mod support addon for ShiNeaL's Simplastic Pack which is linked down in the extras. This addon makes mods have the simplastic style so they don't look out of place! Mods in pack: Alex's Mobs, Appleskin, Create, JEI, & Waystones Credits: ShinyDragon96 - Owner, Founder, Textures, Models, Organizer Swimmingturtle247 - "Simplastic" Idea Extras: Full Pack — ShiNeaL's Simplastic Pack Bedrock Port — ShiNeaL's Simplastic Bedrock CTM Addon — ShiNeaL's Simplastic CTM Realistic Entities — Shiny's Entity Models Plus! Green Screens — Shiny's Green Screen! Liscense: ShiNeaL's Simplastic Mods© 2022 by ShinyDragon96 and ShiNeaL Studios is licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0! - If you use this pack in a video, post, or anything else, it must be linked back to here & credited in my name - !
